summary: The diff implements both REQ-57 and REQ-58. The frontend Home.tsx now correctly uses useGetAllHostels and useGetHostelsByCategory with plain string category values ('Girls', 'Boys', 'Co-Living'), CategoryFilter uses the correct CategoryValue type with matching strings, and the backend main.mo uses Text for category with matching seed data strings. A migration module is also added to convert old enum-based categories to plain strings. All major acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to convert old variant-type categories (#girls, #boys, #coLiving) to plain text strings.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any migration logic or module. REQ-58 only asked to verify/fix the backend filtering logic and seed data alignment, not to create a migration system for converting old data schemas.
